meta.description: Seed data mirrored from the old hardcoded portfolio. Create categories first, upload images in admin, then POST each project (replace cover_image_url / gallery URLs).
how_to_use: 1. In Admin → Project Categories, create every entry in create_categories_first.
2. Upload project images via Admin → Projects (cover + gallery).
3. Create each project with matching fields; map category_names to category_ids from your API.
4. badge_tags / scope values become the grey pill boxes on the project hero (e.g. ARCHITECTURE).

projects.title: EPFO EMPLOYEE HOUSING CAMPUS
projects.short_description: Redevelopment of the EPFO campus at Borivali, Mumbai, comprising planning of 301 residential units.
projects.full_brief: Redevelopment of the EPFO campus at Borivali, Mumbai, comprising planning of 301 residential units across multiple typologies (Type III, IV-S, V, and VI), along with guest house facilities. The development features a high-rise tower (3 basements + ground + 37 floors with 3 podium levels) and a secondary G+4 building, inclusive of all civil works, MEP services, landscaping, and site development.

projects.title: Development of Lakshadweep Islands as Eco-Tourism Resorts
projects.short_description: Low-impact, sustainable eco-tourism resort development across select islands in Lakshadweep.
projects.full_brief: Appointed as Project Architects by the Government of Lakshadweep, in collaboration with Fortress Group, the state level project management agency involved master planning and feasibility analysis for tourism development across select islands. The proposal focused on low-impact, sustainable eco-tourism—integrating resorts, recreation, and infrastructure while preserving the region’s fragile ecology. Key strategies included zoning based on carrying capacity, climate-responsive design, and minimal environmental intervention. The outcome established a clear, phased roadmap for developing a distinctive and sustainable tourism framework for the Union Territory.

projects.short_description: Development of the Income Tax Headquarters at Kheora Bangar, Kanpur.
projects.full_brief: Development of the Income Tax Headquarters at Kheora Bangar, comprising a modern administrative building with two basement levels for multi-level parking and an auditorium. The project also includes 110 residential units (Type II, III, and IV) and an MSTU facility, planned as an integrated institutional campus with supporting infrastructure and landscaped spaces.

projects.title: CENTRAL UNIVERSITY OF PUNJAB, BHATINDA
projects.short_description: Master planning and Phase–1 development of a 500-acre university campus at Ghudda, Bathinda.
projects.full_brief: Master planning and Phase–1 development of a 500-acre university campus at Ghudda, Bathinda, conceived as a large-scale, environment-responsive academic township. The project includes planning of academic, administrative, residential, and sports infrastructure integrated within a structured zoning framework and hierarchical circulation network. Phase–1 focuses on the development of core facilities including academic blocks, administrative buildings, student and faculty housing, and essential campus infrastructure. Designed as a sustainable and energy-efficient campus, the master plan adheres to GRIHA norms with extensive green cover, water management systems, and landscape integration to create a self-sufficient, future-ready institutional environment.
projects.scope: Master Planning, Concept Planning, Comprehensive Detailed Designing

projects.title: GENERAL POOL OFFICE AND ACCOMODATION - 2, NEW DELHI
projects.short_description: A multi-functional government complex integrating office spaces with residential accommodation.
projects.full_brief: A multi-functional government complex integrating office spaces with residential accommodation, originally conceived for the Rural and Urban Ministries and later adapted to serve the Power, Labour, and Shipping Ministries. The development comprises two basement levels and ten floors, designed with a clear segregation of public and private zones and efficient circulation systems. The project incorporates key amenities including a gym, cafeteria, CSD canteen, six conference rooms, and parking for approximately 600 cars, supported by state-of-the-art access and security systems. The architecture adopts climate-responsive strategies, rational massing, and durable materials, ensuring long-term performance while establishing a cohesive and dignified institutional presence

projects.title: NEW PASSENGER TERMINAL BUILDING AT JODHPUR AIRPORT
projects.short_description: New terminal building at Jodhpur Airport, developed to enhance passenger capacity and operational efficiency.
projects.full_brief: Architectural monitoring and project management services for the new terminal building at Jodhpur Airport, developed to enhance passenger capacity and operational efficiency. The design integrates contemporary airport planning with regional architectural character, reflecting the identity of Jodhpur through its form and detailing. projects.title: LUXURY SUITES DESIGN AT SEVERAL LOCATIONS FOR TAJ SAFARIS
projects.short_description: Designed a series of luxury cottages and suites for eco-resorts across multiple national park locations.
projects.full_brief: Designed a series of luxury cottages and suites for eco-resorts across multiple national park locations for the Tata Group, envisioned as immersive yet low-impact hospitality experiences. The design blends a rustic, nature-responsive character with premium comfort, drawing from local vernacular architecture, materials, and craftsmanship. Advanced construction techniques and modern amenities are seamlessly integrated to ensure durability, sustainability, and a refined guest experience while remaining rooted in the ecological and cultural context of each site.

projects.title: Chaudhary Farmhouse
projects.short_description: Development of a luxury family farmhouse set on a 4-acre plot in Chattarpur.
projects.full_brief: Development of a luxury family farmhouse set on a 4-acre plot in Chattarpur, with a built-up area of approximately 12,000 sq.ft. The design is anchored around a grand central foyer, creating a strong spatial axis and seamless connection between indoor and outdoor living spaces. The residence features a swimming pool, landscaped gardens, and distinctive architectural elements including elliptical columns and a domical monolithic RCC car porch. Large beamless cantilevered balcony decks (spanning up to 20 feet) enhance openness and provide expansive views, reflecting a balance of structural innovation and refined residential design.
projects.scope: Comprehensive Detailed Designing, Design and Build

projects.title: Jamshedpur Mall
projects.short_description: A contemporary retail development conceived as a new-age urban destination in Jamshedpur.
projects.full_brief: A contemporary retail development conceived as a new-age urban destination in Jamshedpur, set on a compact 1,000 sqm site with a built-up plinth area of approximately 3,500 sqm. The design maximizes visibility and spatial experience through a bold, transparent façade and vertically stacked retail environments. Envisioned as a vibrant city landmark, the mall integrates dynamic circulation, active frontage, and inviting public interfaces, positioning itself as a modern urban plaza that enhances the city’s retail and social landscape.

projects.title: CRITICAL CARE HOSPITAL AND TRAUMA CENTRE AT AIIMS CAMPUS IN JODHPUR
projects.short_description: A G+6 healthcare facility with a 150-bedded Critical Care Block and 200-bedded Trauma & Emergency Centre.
projects.full_brief: A G+6 healthcare facility with a single basement, comprising a 150-bedded Critical Care Block and 200-bedded Trauma & Emergency Centre, executed in EPC (Design & Build) mode. The project integrates advanced medical infrastructure including modular OTs, MGPS, HVAC, chiller plant, fire safety, electrical and ICT systems, along with comprehensive site development and utility services. Designed to achieve a Gold Star IGBC rating, the facility emphasizes sustainability and operational efficiency. Our role as Principal Monitoring Architect and Project Management Consultant ensured quality control, coordination, and timely delivery of this complex healthcare project.

projects.title: PGIMER SATELLITE CENTRE IN FEROZPUR
projects.short_description: Self-sufficient healthcare campus developed over a 23-acre site in Ferozpur.
projects.full_brief: Self-sufficient healthcare campus developed over a 23-acre site, centered around a 100-bedded, state-of-the-art multi-specialty hospital. The hospital complex includes emergency services, radiology, central labs and blood bank, O.T. suites with critical care units, OPD facilities, and IPD wards, ensuring comprehensive patient care. The campus integrates a residential precinct with staff housing (Type III, IV, V), a guest house, and a bachelor doctor hostel, along with key support infrastructure such as parking, mortuary, laundry, MGPS, solid waste management, kitchen, substations, HVAC plant, and water and sewage treatment systems. Our role as Project Monitoring and Management Consultant ensured seamless coordination, quality control, and timely execution of this integrated healthcare facility.
projects.client: HLL Infra Tech Services Pvt. Ltd. (HITES)

projects.title: DELHI ROADS STREETSCAPING
projects.short_description: Comprehensive urban planning and streetscape design for over 60 km of PWD roads across Delhi.
projects.full_brief: This project involved comprehensive urban planning and streetscape design for over 60 km of PWD roads across Delhi, aimed at transforming congested corridors into efficient, people-centric public spaces. The intervention focused on resolving traffic bottlenecks, improving last-mile connectivity, and enhancing overall streetscape quality. The design strategy integrated segregated carriageways, dedicated cycle tracks, organized parking, and improved pedestrian infrastructure including wider footpaths and universal accessibility. Key junctions and high-conflict zones were rationalized to ease movement and reduce congestion. Alongside mobility improvements, the project emphasized urban beautification and public realm enhancement through coordinated landscaping, street furniture, signage systems, and lighting design. Infrastructure upgrades included provisions for drainage, utilities coordination, and public amenities, ensuring long-term functionality and maintainability. The outcome establishes a cohesive and scalable framework for safe, efficient, and visually enhanced urban streets, contributing to a more sustainable and user-friendly city environment.

notes.local_cover_asset_hint: Previously used local asset for id "delhi-streetscaping" — upload cover + 0 gallery images in admin.
